title: anthemis tenuifolia
intro: Anthemis tenuifolia, also known as yarrow leafed chamomile or thread-leaved chamomile, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Anthemis tenuifolia include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Anthemis tenuifolia can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for herbal remedies, and is also used in skincare products due to its anti-aging and soothing properties.
